history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell B2 facing right. The goal is at H8. I plan to move right along row02 to G2, then go down through column G to G6, then right to H6, then down to H8. The next cell forward (C2) is empty, so I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2, C) facing right. The goal is at (8, H). The immediate safe move is to go forward to (2, D) as it is a floor cell. This will get me closer to the path that leads down to the goal via (2, G) and then down to (6, G), right to (6, H), and down to goal. So I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing right. The cell directly ahead (row 02 column E) is empty floor ('.'), so it's safe to move forward. I need to reach the goal at row 08 column H, and a clear path exists by moving right to column G, then down to row 8, then right to column H. For now, moving forward is the correct first step.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row2 colE facing right. The goal is at row8 colH. I need to navigate around the lava. The safest path seems to go right to (2,G), then down through (3,G) and further down, then right to (6,H) and down to goal. So first I will move forward to (2,F).
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (02,F) facing right. The goal is at (08,H). I can move forward to (02,G) which is safe. Then I will need to turn down, then move down several steps, then turn right, move right, turn down, and move down to goal. So the immediate next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column G facing right (>). The goal is at row 08 column H. To move towards the goal, I need to go down. First, I will rotate clockwise to face down, then move forward to row 03 column G which is safe.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column G, facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 03, column G) is floor, so I can safely move forward. This is the first step in a path that leads to the goal at row 08, column H, avoiding lava cells.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column G, facing down. The goal is at row 08, column H. The cell directly in front of me (row 04, column G) is a floor cell (safe). Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal. I plan to go down to row 06, then turn left? Actually I need to turn counter-clockwise to face right to reach column H, but first I need to move down three times. The immediate next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row4 column G facing down. The cell directly in front (row5 column G) is a floor cell ('.'), which is safe to move into. My goal is to reach the goal at row8 column H. I will move forward one step to advance downward.
</thought>
<action>FRENTE</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column G, facing down. The goal is at row 08 column H. The cell directly below (6,G) is safe, but the next cell (7,G) is lava, so I cannot go straight down. Instead, I need to go right to (5,H), then down through safe cells (6,H) and (7,H) to reach the goal. To change my orientation from down to right, I need to turn counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 5, column G facing right. The goal is at row 8, column H. The cell directly in front of me (5,H) is a floor cell, so I can move forward safely. After that, I will need to turn clockwise to face down and then move down to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column H facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H, directly below. The cells at (06,H), (07,H), and (08,H) are all safe floor. I need to face down to move forward. Turning clockwise from right will face me down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row5, column H, facing down (v). The goal is at row8, column H, directly below. The cells in between are safe (row6 col H is ., row7 col H is .). I can move forward repeatedly. So my next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H facing down (v). The goal is directly below at row 08 column H. The cell directly in front (row 07 column H) is floor (.), which is safe. I can move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column H, facing down. The goal is directly below me at row 08, column H. Moving forward will take me to the goal cell. There are no obstacles in the way. I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
